title: AN ACT DECLARING THE 2ND OF AUGUST OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF BUTUAN

chunks.text:
H. No. 1828 / 97 OG No. 3, 367 (Jan. 15, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8802, July 19, 2000 ]

AN ACT DECLARING THE 2ND OF AUGUST OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF BUTUAN

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. August 2 of every year is hereby declared as a special working public holiday in the City of Butuan, in recognition and in commemoration of the city's charter foundation day.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect immediately upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.) MANUEL B. VILLAR JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 17, 1999 and

May 29, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G.

YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved:

July 19, 2000.

(Sgd.) JOSEPH E.

ESTRADA

President of the Philippines
